use_cases: Indicates loading state during data fetching or async operations
Provides visual feedback during page transitions or route changes
Shows processing status in button or card components
Displays loading progress in dashboard or analytics interfaces
ai_summary: A rotating circular loader component featuring a vibrant solar-inspired orange-yellow gradient effect with 3D skeuomorphic styling. The loader uses inset and outer box shadows to create depth, with a continuous 360-degree rotation animation that conveys active processing. Designed as a reusable atomic component for indicating loading states across various application contexts.
